description: As an administrator (canvas@example.edu / canvas-docker), create and publish a 'Graded Quiz' named 'BIO101 Final Examination' in the BIO101 course. Configure the quiz with a 90-minute time limit, 1 allowed attempt, access code 'BIO101FINAL', shuffled answers, and show one question at a time. The description must include the phrases 'comprehensive final' and 'closed-book'. Set the due date for 21 days from today, with availability starting 20 days from today and ending 22 days from today.
